CommunicationResponses: Legacy DSTU2 resource: data-exporter/merkalis export proxies read it with a `|| {}` guard for old-bundle compatibility; the app intentionally does not register it.
InventoryItems: life-support-systems reads it behind an existence guard; the InventoryItem resource is not implemented in the app (simulation falls back).
Sequences: Legacy DSTU2/STU3 name for MolecularSequences: data-exporter/merkalis exporters capture it guarded for old-bundle compatibility. Opportunistic fix: migrate exporters to MolecularSequences.
